turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Esta llamada puede ser grabada para motivos de calidad y entrenamiento. Para Español, oprima el 2.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Hey there, I’m calling to book an appointment

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Thanks for calling Pivot Point Orthopaedics.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Hi,

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: part of pretty good AI.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Am I speaking with Alex?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Uh, no, this is Richard.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Thank you for letting me know, Richard.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Are you calling for yourself or for someone else today?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Yeah, I'm calling for myself, about my knee.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: please provide your date of birth.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Sure, it’s August 4th, 2000.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: I need your full name.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: including your last name.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Yeah, it's Richard

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: along with your date of birth.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Could you please tell me your last name?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Oh, right, it's Feynman.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Treat Richard

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: How can I help with your need today?

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Are you looking to schedule an appointment asked about a previous visit?

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: or something else?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: I'm looking to schedule an appointment for my right knee.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Is this a new issue with your right knee or are you following up on a previous visit or injury?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: It's a new issue, I think I tweaked it running.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Thanks for explaining

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Just to confirm, you'd like to schedule an appointment for a new knee injury from running.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Is that right?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Yeah, that’s right. Just need to get something on the books soon.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Do you have a specific provider you'd like to see or are you open to the first available appointment?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: I'm good with the first available, just want to get in soon.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Let me check for the soonest available appointments for your knee injury.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: One moment.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Sure, no problem, I'll wait.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: They're off

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Hey, did you find something?

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Would you like me to check for openings later next week?

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Or is there a specific date you have in mind?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Yeah, if there's anything early next week, that'd be perfect.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: There aren't any openings early next week, either. Would you like me to keep checking for later dates, or would you prefer to have someone from the office follow up with you as soon as something opens up?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Let's check later in the week—maybe Thursday or Friday.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: There still aren't any openings later in the week.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Would you like me to have the office contact you as soon as something becomes available?

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: or should I keep searching for later dates?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Yeah, go ahead and have them contact me when something opens up.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: There aren't any open appointments for your right knee at the moment.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: I'll let our clinic support team know you want to be seen and they'll contact you as soon as a slot opens up.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Would you like to add any details about your knee pain for the team?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Yeah, just let them know it's from running, and it's on the right side.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: I've documented that you need an appointment for new right knee pain from running.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: The clinic team will contact you as soon as a spot opens up.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Is there anything else I can help you with today?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: All right, sounds

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Nah, that covers it. Thanks, I'll wait for their call.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: You're all set. The clinic will reach out as soon as they have an opening. Have a good day, Richard.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Thanks, you too. Take care.
